settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Immigration and Visa Services

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: What immigration services do you provide?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: We offer visa consultation, application support, document preparation, permanent residency, citizenship guidance, and reapplication assistance.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: How do I know which visa is right for me?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: Our experts assess your background and goals to recommend the most suitable visa option.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: How long does the visa process take?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: Processing times vary by country and visa type. We provide estimated timelines after assessment.
No consultant can guarantee approval, but we ensure accurate preparation and compliance to maximize success.

ekit_accordion_items.acc_title: Can you help if my visa was refused?
ekit_accordion_items.acc_content: Yes, we assist with appeals, refusals, and reapplications.
We support applications for Canada, Australia, UK, Europe, and other major destinations.
